Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'echo "=== binaries ==="; ls -lh ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-cli ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-quantize 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; echo "=== ldd llama-server ==="; ldd ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server 2>&1 | grep -E "not found|hip|rocm|=>" | head -15; echo "---"; echo "=== version ==="; ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server --version 2>&1 | head -3')

Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'echo "=== VRAM usage ==="; rocm-smi --showmemuse --showuse 2>&1 | head -30; echo "---"; echo "=== GPU processes ==="; rocm-smi --showpids 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---"; echo "=== Ollama running models? ==="; ollama ps 2>&1')

Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'echo "=== VRAM total \(server\) ==="; rocm-smi --showmeminfo vram 2>&1 | head -10; echo "---"; rocminfo 2>&1 | grep -E "Name:|Marketing|Compute Unit|Pool Info|Size:" | head -25')

Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'echo "=== висящие llama процессы на сервере ==="; pgrep -fa llama 2>/dev/null; pgrep -fa "build|cmake|hipcc|clang++" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; echo "=== освобождена ли VRAM сервера ==="; rocm-smi --showmemuse 2>&1 | grep -E "GPU\\[|use" | head')

Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'echo "12345678" | sudo -S apt install -y postgresql-16-pgvector 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "---"; echo "12345678" | sudo -S -u postgres psql gpu_rag_dsp -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;" 2>&1; echo "---"; echo "12345678" | sudo -S -u postgres pg_restore -d gpu_rag_dsp --no-owner --role=dsp_asst -t embeddings /tmp/gpu_rag_dsp.dump 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "---"; echo "=== verify embeddings table ==="; PGPASSWORD=1 psql -h localhost -U dsp_asst -d gpu_rag_dsp -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM rag_dsp.embeddings;" 2>&1')
Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'pkill -f "llama-cli.*qwen" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "timeout.*llama" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; pgrep -fa llama-cli 2>/dev/null | head; echo "\(пусто = ок\)"')
Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'pkill -9 -f llama-cli 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; pgrep -fa llama 2>/dev/null; echo "OK"')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 user@10.10.4.105 'pgrep -fa llama 2>&1; echo "==="; uptime')

Bash(ssh user@10.10.4.105 'cd ~/llama.cpp && nohup ./build/bin/llama-server -m models/qwen-coder-14b-dsp.gguf -ngl 99 -c 4096 -fa on --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 > /tmp/llama-server.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 2; echo "started PID=$\(pgrep -f llama-server | head -1\)"')

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 user@10.10.4.105 'pgrep -f llama-server | head; echo ===; ls -la /etc/systemd/system/llama-server.service /etc/default/llama-server 2>&1')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=15 user@10.10.4.105 'systemctl is-active llama-server@14b.service; echo ===; journalctl -u llama-server@14b.service -n 15 --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -15')
